Footer.tagline: The complete restaurant marketing platform. One dashboard, every guest touchpoint.

Hero.subheadline: More than a digital menu — Feather turns every guest scan into automatic push notifications, promotions, event bookings, and live TV content. One dashboard. Zero extra effort.
Hero.trustLine: 14-day free trial · Credit card required · No charge until day 15 · Cancel anytime

ComparisonSection.title: Not just another QR menu.
ComparisonSection.description: Most tools stop at showing a list. Feather turns every scan into a full marketing event — automatically.

basicCard.title: Basic QR Menu Tool
items: Guest scans and sees a static list
Guests leave and you lose touch
No TV or in-venue screen presence

featherCard.badge: One scan. Your entire marketing stack.

items: Native App Clip — no download, sub-100ms
Banner + Top Product upsell on every open

FeaturesGrid.title: Every tool your restaurant needs.
FeaturesGrid.description: One platform. Six powerful touchpoints. All managed from a single admin dashboard.

features.title: Instant Native Experience
features.description: iOS App Clip launches instantly — no download required. Android opens directly via the web. For up to 3 seconds, an animated loading scene entertains guests while assets preload, then transitions smoothly into the full menu.

features.title: Product Banners
features.description: The very first thing guests see — admin-controlled hero banners and featured items that add to cart in a single tap.

features.title: Auto Push Notifications
features.description: Every QR scan auto-schedules a promo notification one hour later. Image, video, or 'Order now' — fully controlled from your admin.

features.title: Event Promotions
features.description: Guests receive event notifications with 'Book now' and 'Remind me' to save directly to their calendar. No flyers, no follow-up calls.

features.title: TV Display App
features.description: Turn every venue screen into a live promo slideshow — products, events, partner ads — updated in real time from your admin.

features.title: One-Tap Service
features.description: Call Waiter and Call Receipt go straight to staff with the exact table number. Faster service, fewer interruptions, happier guests.

admin.description: Your admin controls every guest touchpoint — menu, marketing, events, staff, and TV screens — all at once, with no technical knowledge required.

apps.description: iOS and Android staff apps receive table requests, menu updates, and management alerts in real time — keeping service sharp and your team on the same page.
features: Real-time Call Waiter / Call Receipt alerts

HowItWorks.title: Up and running in minutes.
HowItWorks.description: No developers, no complicated onboarding. Three steps and your restaurant's entire marketing stack is live.
HowItWorks.trustLine: 14-day free trial · Credit card required · No charge until day 15 · Cancel anytime

steps.title: Set up your menu
steps.description: Upload a photo or PDF of your existing paper menu — AI builds the full menu for you, translated and localized across all supported languages. Most restaurants are live in under 10 minutes.

steps.title: Activate your marketing
steps.description: Configure banners, featured products, event promotions, and push notification content — all from the same admin. No extra tools, no extra logins.

steps.title: Every scan works for you
steps.description: Guests get a native app experience. Notifications fire automatically. TV screens update live. Staff get real-time service alerts. All hands-free.

PromotionsROI.description: Every QR scan auto-schedules a push notification. Here's what that looks like at 1,000 scans a month — with zero extra work from you.
PromotionsROI.disclaimer: Based on illustrative estimates. Results vary by venue, promotion quality, and audience.

promotions.title: Fill more seats without lifting a finger.

Testimonials.title: Loved by restaurants worldwide.
Testimonials.description: From independent cafés to multi-location venues — restaurants that switched to Feather didn't look back.

testimonials.quote: We switched from a basic QR menu and within a week our banner was promoting our new cocktail menu. Sales went up 23% that month alone.
testimonials.name: Marco Bianchi

testimonials.quote: The TV display app alone was worth it. Guests read our event promos while waiting, and event bookings have tripled since we started using Feather.
testimonials.name: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: Push notifications changed how we think about slow Tuesdays. We sent a promo and had a fully booked evening. Never happened with a regular QR menu.
testimonials.name: Ahmed Al-Rashid

PricingTeaser.title: Simple, transparent pricing.
PricingTeaser.description: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready to unlock the full marketing platform.
PricingTeaser.trialGuarantee: Paid plans start with a 14-day free trial. A credit card is required to begin — but no payment is processed until day 15. Cancel anytime before then and you won't be charged.
PricingTeaser.trialNote: Credit card required · No charge for 14 days · Cancel anytime

CTABand.title: Ready to make every scan count?

FeaturesPageHero.description: Six powerful touchpoints — all managed from a single admin dashboard. No downloads required, no tech skills needed, no friction for your guests.

features.title: Instant Native Experience
features.description: Once a guest taps Open from a QR code scan, Feather launches immediately — no App Store download, no sign-up screen, no waiting. iOS uses App Clip and Android uses Instant App technology to deliver a fully native experience in under a second. The menu loads with silky-smooth animations and sub-100ms response times, feeling as fast and familiar as any app they already have on their phone.
bullets: iOS App Clip & Android Instant App — zero install required
Up to 3-second loading scene entertains while assets download
Sub-100ms response times and smooth, native-feeling animations
Admin controls menu layout and categories from web or mobile app

features.title: Product Banners
features.description: Right below the service buttons, guests see a full-width banner image — the first marketing touchpoint in their browsing session. You set it up from your admin app by selecting a product and uploading an image. When a guest taps the banner, a product is added to their cart, an event page opens for booking, or they're redirected to any linked page. No searching, no extra steps. It's the perfect spotlight for signature cocktails, seasonal specials, or even paid supplier promotions.
bullets: Full-width hero banner — the first thing guests notice
Tap to add product to cart, open an event, or redirect to any URL
Perfect for high-margin items, seasonal specials, and partner promos
Fully managed from your admin app — update anytime, instantly

features.title: Auto Push Notifications
features.description: Every time a guest scans your QR code, Feather automatically schedules a local push notification to appear one hour later — while the guest is still nearby and thinking about food. Tapping the notification opens a full promo screen with a featured image or video, custom title, description, and an Order now button. If the app is opened another way, it checks whether the promo was already shown and schedules it if not. All content is fully managed through your admin app — no technical work required.
bullets: Fires automatically on every QR code scan — zero staff effort
Promo screen with image, video, title, description, and CTA
Content fully managed from your admin app
Opens a natural revenue channel for paid supplier promotions

features.title: Event Promotions
features.description: Just like product promotions, event notifications are triggered automatically when a guest scans your QR code — a reminder appears one hour later, keeping your event top-of-mind even after the guest has left. Tapping the notification opens a custom event screen with an image or video, title, and description. Guests then see two clear actions: Book now to call the venue directly, and Remind me to save the event to their calendar with a single tap. Fill more seats without any flyers, follow-up calls, or staff effort.
bullets: Triggered 1 hour after QR scan — just like product promos
"Book now" calls the venue, "Remind me" saves to their calendar
Custom image or video content set from the admin app
Fill more seats without flyers, posts, or staff time

features.title: TV Display App
features.description: The TV App turns every screen in your venue into a dynamic, always-on promo display. A looping slideshow cycles through products, upcoming events, partner advertisements, and featured items — all managed and scheduled from your admin dashboard. Each slide has a configurable display duration, so you control the pacing. Content updates in real time, meaning a new promo you set at the bar appears on every screen within seconds. It's effortless in-venue marketing that keeps guests informed and engaged throughout their visit.
bullets: Products, events, and partner ads in a dynamic slideshow
Per-slide duration control — set how long each slide is shown
Real-time updates from admin push to all screens instantly
Opens a recurring revenue stream for partner & supplier advertising

features.title: One-Tap Service Requests
features.description: Just below your business info, guests see two clear action buttons: Call Waiter and Call Receipt. With a single tap, a request goes straight to your staff's app with the table number — no waving, no wondering if someone noticed. The right server knows exactly where to go, every time. This reduces delays, improves table turnover, and ensures every guest feels attended to. Faster service keeps guests happier, and happier guests order more and tip better.
bullets: "Call Waiter" and "Call Receipt" visible on every guest menu
Alerts go directly to staff app with the exact table number
Reduces delays and eliminates missed requests
Faster table turnover — guests order more, tip better
